Description 

Menzerna's heavy cutting power removes scratches, overspray and severe signs of use quickly and thoroughly at the best value. Heavy Cut Compound (HCC) 1000, formerly known as Power Gloss 1000 (PG 1000) and S34A, reliably removes sanding marks from 1,500 to 2,000 grit. Benefits: – Quick removal of sanding marks – Uniform sanding pattern - High productivity – No dust formation – Silicone-free For ideal polishing conditions after rough sanding, look no further than Menzerna Heavy Cut Classic and High Performance Polishing Compounds. Scratches, overspray and severe signs of use are removed quickly, reliably and thoroughly, while innovative, highly abrasive one-step products with the latest polishing technology complete the heavy-cut segment. Professional automotive coatings based on industrial process standards maximize efficiency!

### Description

Menzerna's heavy cutting power removes scratches, overspray and severe signs of use quickly and thoroughly at the best value. Heavy Cut Compound (HCC) 1000, formerly known as Power Gloss 1000 (PG 1000) and S34A, reliably removes sanding marks from 1,500 to 2,000 grit. Benefits: – Quick removal of sanding marks – Uniform sanding pattern - High productivity – No dust formation – Silicone-free For ideal polishing conditions after rough sanding, look no further than Menzerna Heavy Cut Classic and High Performance Polishing Compounds. Scratches, overspray and severe signs of use are removed quickly, reliably and thoroughly, while innovative, highly abrasive one-step products with the latest polishing technology complete the heavy-cut segment. Professional automotive coatings based on industrial process standards maximize efficiency!
